headline: Citigroup (C) Joins London Precious Metals Clearing Limited As Bullion Reach Expands
summary: Citigroup (NYSE:C) has joined London Precious Metals Clearing Limited as a clearing member. The move expands Citi’s role in settling trades in the Loco London market for gold, silver, platinum and palladium. This development broadens the bank’s global precious metals capabilities within the bullion market infrastructure. Citigroup, trading at $143.86, is adding fresh weight to its commodities platform by entering the LPMCL clearing club. The stock has shown strong momentum, with shares up...

headline: Citi says SpaceX stock has path to $900+ valuation. Here’s how
summary: Investing.com -- Citi launched coverage of Space Exploration Technologies with a Buy rating and a $200 price target, implying roughly 25% upside by year-end, while also outlining a longer-term path toward a valuation that could exceed $900 per share.
